overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark medieval village at night. The character moves along a dirt path between wooden thatched-roof cottages with a large stone keep visible in the stormy background, approaching a group of NPCs gathered near a wooden structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village outskirts with stone keep visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the village center, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: large stone fortress tower visible in the background against the stormy sky
traditional wooden house with straw thatched roof lining the village path
rough wooden posts marking the edge of the dirt path
unpaved dirt road forming the main walkway through the village

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark medieval village path at night. Geralt walks forward along a dirt trail flanked by grassy banks and wooden fence posts. A large stone keep looms in the distant background while thatched-roof cottages line the left side of the path. The scene is devoid of other people, with only the ambient sounds of the village and stormy weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with NPC gathering near wooden structures

events.description: group of villagers becomes visible ahead standing near a wooden notice board

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing forward and slightly right, approaching a group of villagers gathered near a wooden structure

notable_agents.action: group of three villagers standing stationary near a wooden notice board or post

entered.detail: wooden post or board structure where villagers are gathered, possibly a notice or quest board
wooden frame structure attached to the side of the cottage

segments.scene_description: As Geralt moves deeper into the village, the stone keep fades into the distant background. The path continues between thatched cottages now closer to the camera. A group of NPCs stands gathered around a wooden notice board in the center of the path ahead. Wooden scaffolding becomes visible on the left cottage as the character approaches the small crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark medieval village that shifts from a lonely path toward a gathered crowd of villagers. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail flanked by grassy banks and wooden fence posts, while a large stone keep looms in the stormy distance behind thatched-roof cottages. As he moves deeper into the village, the distant keep fades from view and the cottages draw closer to the camera. The scene then opens up to reveal a group of NPCs gathered around a wooden notice board in the center of the path, with wooden scaffolding appearing on a nearby cottage as the character approaches the small crowd.
